build._comment: TODO before first build: replace BUNDLE_ID_TBD with the real iOS bundle identifier (e.g. com.bubs960.figurepinner) and ANDROID_PACKAGE_TBD with the matching Android package. Both should match across iOS and Android per Expo convention.

production._comment: LAUNCH POSTURE 2026-04-26: ships v1+v2 in a single binary. Sign-in + vault + wantlist + alerts ON from day one. Required: pk_live_* Clerk key (currently pointed at dev pk_test_* — swap before submitting to App Store / Play Store).

preview-v1._comment: Apple-rejection contingency. v1 read-only browser, no Clerk, no vault, no alerts. Use this to ship a quick replacement binary if the App Privacy questionnaire / sign-in review trips on the v2 production binary.

preview-v2._comment: v2 against the dev Worker. Uses the dev Clerk pk_test_* + dev Worker URL. For internal smoke testing of sign-in + vault + alerts before the production binary ships.

ios._comment: Fill in once Apple Developer enrollment is active. ascAppId is the App Store Connect numeric id (visible in the URL once the app record is created). appleId + ascApiKeyPath / appleTeamId can be set via `eas credentials` for safer storage.

android._comment: serviceAccountKeyPath points at the Google Play service-account JSON for automated submission. Manual upload through Play Console works if you'd rather not configure the service account up front.
